home.intro: Schedule your admission exam online — safe, simple, and in just a few minutes.
home.step1Desc: Fill out the form and choose the date and time that works best for you
home.bannerText: On the day of your appointment, pay the exam fee at the front desk.

agendar.title: Admission appointment request
agendar.subtitle: Fill in the details to schedule the admission exam.

campus.heading: Campus & level
campus.desc: Select the campus and education level of interest.

aspirante.heading: Student Information
aspirante.noSchedules: No schedules configured for this level. The school will contact you to confirm.
aspirante.howLabel: How did you hear about us? *

tutor.heading: Parent / Guardian
tutor.nameLabel: Full name of parent or guardian *

confirm.heading: Confirm your request
confirm.hourPending: To be confirmed (school will contact you)

success.title: Appointment scheduled successfully
success.emailText: We have registered your request. You will receive a confirmation email at {email} with your appointment details.
success.reqText: In order to receive the admission results, you must complete the following before your appointment:

exitModal.title: Do you want to submit your request?
exitModal.text: If you leave without submitting, you will need to fill out the form again. Please confirm:
exitModal.item1: Submission of required documents by email
exitModal.item2: Payment of $200 MXN at the front desk on appointment day
exitModal.cancelBtn: No, I do not want to submit

agendar.errorMsg: Could not save the appointment. Please try again or contact the campus.

familiaWinston.title: REFER A STUDENT
familiaWinston.subtitle: Winston Family Program
familiaWinston.desc: Please enter the control number or name of the student to whom the benefit is to be granted.
familiaWinston.searchPlaceholder: ENTER NAME, LAST NAME OR CONTROL NUMBER...
familiaWinston.voucherP1: This document certifies that the applicant {name} to enroll in {level} for the {cycle} school year, grants the student with control number {ctrl} ({refName}) the benefit of being registered in the Winston Family Program.
familiaWinston.voucherP2: The Winston Family Program aims to support and foster collaboration between families and our institution to provide a better educational experience for our students.
familiaWinston.voucherP3: Please keep this voucher for any procedures related to the program.

menu.importantText: To receive the admission exam results, it is mandatory to complete
menu.invalidLink: Invalid link. Appointment ID is missing.
menu.card1Desc: Form with information about the applicant and their family. The first fields are pre-filled.
menu.card2Desc: Upload the required documents (certificate, report cards, good conduct letter).

documentacion.title: 📤 Upload Documents
documentacion.subtitle: Required to deliver exam results
documentacion.docsIntro: Please upload the following documents. This step is required for the school psychologist to deliver the admission exam results.

docs.doc1: Latest internal report card of the current year
docs.doc2: Official report card from the previous school year
docs.doc3: Good conduct letter from the current school year

documentacion.overLimit: ⚠️ Total size exceeds the limit. Please reduce the size of a file before sending.
documentacion.footerNote: * Documents will be sent to the school psychologist. You will receive a copy at your email.
documentacion.successText: We have received your documents and forwarded them to the campus psychologist.
documentacion.successEmail: You will receive a confirmation copy at:
documentacion.errorMinFile: You must upload at least one document.
documentacion.atLeastOne: You must upload at least one document.
